markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's draft content strategy and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** The 6-cluster strategy was approved, balancing AI authority with core Redis topics. The "LLM Optimization & Cost Reduction" cluster will be reframed to "LLM App Optimization" to better align with Redis's strengths beyond just cost.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [**Critical Messaging Alignment:** The "AI Agents" cluster is on hold pending Redis's new messaging playbook (due EOW) to ensure consistent, on-brand language.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [**Data Integration:** GrowthX will get access to Redis's Profound instance to align LLM tracking. Redis will provide 12 months of "hand raiser" (meeting bookings) data by subdirectory for performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**High Ranking Potential:** Redis's high domain authority (\>50) means new content can rank quickly. A key opportunity is refreshing \~40% of existing posts that are stuck on pages 2–5 to push them to page 1.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: Goals & Analysis

  - [**Partnership Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Scale Production:** Increase output from 4 posts/quarter to 5/week, mixing new content with refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [**Recover Organic Traffic:** Address recent declines by optimizing existing posts.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [**Build AI Authority:** Establish Redis as a leader in vector databases, semantic caching, and agent memory.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Content Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Redis:** Strong in caching, data structures, and vector databases.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Competitors:** Focus on AI infrastructure, vector search, RAG, and agentic AI.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
      - [**Technical Depth:** Redis content has a good balance. Competitors like Milvus are highly technical, while Pinecone is product-focused with enterprise topics (RAG, security).](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy: 6 Clusters

  - [**1. Vector Database Fundamentals:** Build on existing content (e.g., "What is a Vector Database?") with refreshes and new topics.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [**2. RAG & Retrieval Architecture:** Position Redis as the infrastructure layer for RAG systems, covering the full data pipeline (vector search, keyword search, speed).](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [**3. AI Agents & Agentic Systems:** Position Redis as the tool for fast, persistent memory. **On hold pending Redis messaging playbook.**](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [**4. LLM Optimization & Cost Reduction:** Reframed to **LLM App Optimization**. Focus on performance and accuracy, not just cost.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [**5. Competitive Comparisons:** Continue creating comparison blogs, listicles, and "alternatives" posts, which drive fast LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX uses a "product feature matrix" (Notion doc) to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [**6. Top Verticals:** Create content for tech and financial services, linking general topics (e.g., AI for fraud detection) to specific Redis solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

### Reporting & Data Alignment

  - [**LLM Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Problem:** GrowthX uses Scrunch, while Redis uses Profound, creating data silos.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Solution:** Redis will grant GrowthX access to its Profound instance to align tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Performance Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
      - [**Request:** Aida requested MQL data for blog/glossary performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
      - [**Solution:** Redis will provide 12 months of "hand raiser" (meeting bookings) data by subdirectory, which is a strong indicator of intent.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
  - [**New Dashboard:** GrowthX will build a Looker dashboard merging GSC/GA4 data, including an LLM referral page.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Content Production Logistics

  - [**Featured Images:** GrowthX can provide AI-generated featured images (abstract graphics or text overlays) to streamline publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX designer Katya creates a prompt based on Redis brand guidelines → GPT generates 5–10 image options per post.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
      - [**Decision:** Cody will share this proposal with the Redis design team.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Redis Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Review and comment on the 3 content artifacts (Writing Guidelines, Personas, Company Context) in Notion by next Tuesday/Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Share the "AI Agents" messaging playbook with GrowthX by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
      - [Provide 12 months of "hand raiser" data by subdirectory.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
      - [Grant Erik O'Brien access to the Redis Profound instance.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [Decide on using GrowthX's featured image generation service.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [Update the "LLM Optimization" cluster to "LLM App Optimization" in the strategy doc.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [Add "Cache Modernization" as a potential new cluster to the onboarding doc.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [Create a competitor analysis table detailing their content focus and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Conduct in-depth keyword research for the 6 approved clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
      - [Populate the content calendar with 50–80 blog ideas for Redis review.](https://fathom.video/share/8DhcaRkzJ2kUWgN3zU-LEMB_ByDxWXTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
